subject: a large roughly humanoid figure composed of roots, bark, and wood, covered in mushrooms and fungal growth, rising from a rocky underground space
description: A large elemental or creature figure fills the frame, its body made entirely of intertwined roots, pale bark, and organic matter. Clusters of mushrooms grow across its shoulders and upper body, and trailing tendrils of root hang from its limbs. Glowing blue-white spores or particles drift in the air around it. The figure appears to be rising or leaning forward from a rocky cave or underground grotto. No distinct face is visible — the head region is a dense tangle of roots and fungal caps. The palette is dominated by pale grey-greens, sandy browns, and muted olive tones, punctuated by soft blue luminescence from the spores.
foreground: elemental creature body of roots and bark, mushrooms growing from shoulders and arms, trailing root tendrils
background: rocky cave or grotto, glowing blue-white spores floating in air
emotion: impassive rising — no readable face, posture suggests emergence or awakening
